race.comment: FLYING AKEED (6) put in a career-best performance when runner-up at Ipswich last time out and looks to be improving with racing. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and can go one better against this line-up. LOVE REBEL (7) has placed around this circuit and will strip fitter second-up from the spell. Sure to make her presence felt. JOLLY JAPES (9) hit the frame over this course and distance at the latest effort and hoop Graham sticks in the saddle. Top-three aspirations. HELL OF A HIGH (5) wasn't too far away at the Gold Coast when facing the starter for the first time and will have come on with that run now under the belt. In the mix. ARDIE THREE (1) is on debut but has shown ability at the trials and won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this lot. Keep very safe.

favourite.name: Flying Akeed
favourite.silk_colours: BLACK, WHITE EPAULETTES WITH ROYAL BLUE OUTLINE, WHITE AND ROYAL BLUE STRIPED CAP
